narrative:
Warren County has 174,908 registered voters, with 54.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 33.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 21.8 percentage points. Gen X are the largest generational cohort at 27.9% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.8% D−R vs -35.0% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
